## Testing

- [ ] `./gradlew build`
- [ ] `find src/main/resources -name '*.json' -print0 | xargs -0 jq empty`
- [ ] `git diff --check`
- [ ] Not run; explain why:

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and does not include unrelated cleanup.
- [ ] User-facing text is updated in both `en_us.json` and `zh_cn.json` when applicable.
- [ ] Visual, GUI, shader, or rendering changes include screenshots or clips when possible.
- [ ] New or changed behavior is documented when it affects players or pack makers.
